nasb.text: So you shall observe to do just as the Lord your God has commanded you; you shall not turn aside to the right or to the left.

esv.text: You shall be careful therefore to do as the Lord your God has commanded you. You shall not turn aside to the right hand or to the left.

cnv.text: 所以，你們要照著耶和華你們的　神吩咐你們的，謹守遵行，不可偏離左右。

ccb.text: 所以，你们要谨遵你们上帝耶和华的吩咐，不可偏离左右。
